```
API Error: 400 Validation: Unsupported parameter(s): `tool_stream`
```

`inferRemoteModelOpenAIShim

title: [PR] Bound provider calls and reclaim expired leases in services gateway
summary:
Fixes #23

A hung litellm HTTP call never returns, so its gateway lease was held until the owning process died. With the machine-wide LLM cap of 2, two hung calls froze every skill in every process for the full 3600s wait timeout. Observed after switching `LLM_MODEL` to a cloud provider: a stalled

title: [PR] Local-model extraction seam (EXP-05)
summary:
## What

Adds `LocalSeam`, a third extraction-seam implementation alongside `NoOpSeam` and `BedrockSeam`, that routes low-confidence PDF pages to a model server running on the deployer's own machine (Ollama's HTTP API) instead of a cloud API. It never leaves loopback (`127.0.0.1`, `localhost`, `::1`

title: [PR] fix(ng-dashboards): stop Data Explorer relative-time from throwing NG0100
summary:
## Summary
  The Data Explorer home dashboard throws `NG0100: ExpressionChangedAfterItHasBeenCheckedError` (dev builds) from its "Recent Records" relative-time labels. This pre-computes the label into a stored field and binds that, so the template never computes time during change detection.

  #

title: [PR] fix(core): a failed TransactionGroup no longer crashes the host process
summary:
## Summary
A failed `TransactionGroup.Submit()` currently **kills the entire Node process** — e.g. MJAPI exits on the first rolled-back transaction group. This makes `BaseEntity.Save()`'s transaction-group failure path record the failure on the entity's `ResultHistory` instead of throwing, mirrorin

title: [PR] fix(runtime): route local Ollama through proxy
summary:

- Route shell/runtime `ollama-local` sandbox-facing URLs through the Ollama auth proxy on non-WSL-Docker-Desktop hosts.
- Keep raw `:11434` routing only for WSL + Docker Desktop, where containers can reach host loopback directly.
- Add runtime shell tests for native proxy routing, WSL Doc
